title: [phase:replan] [family:reporting] [provider_hint:codex] Current task: openclaw-tmux replacement. Produce a concise operator-facing checkpoint: what is done, what remains blocked, and the next safest action. No edits.
summary_text: Concrete command-shape mismatches (adapter assumption vs live `nlm` CLI): - `notebook create` vs `create` Adapter builds `nlm notebook create "<title>"` ([notebooklm-cli-adapter.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/lib/notebooklm-cli-adapter.sh#L499)); live help lists `create <title>` (from `/Users/masayuki/go/bin/nlm --help` and [main.go](/Users/masayuki/go/pkg/mod/github.com/tmc/nlm@v0.0.0-20260306170916-7c12ab8a839d/cmd/nlm/main.go#L78)). - `source add ... --url/--file/--text/--youtube/--drive [--title] [--wait]` vs `add <notebook-id> <input>` Adapter builds `nlm source add ...` with typed flags ([notebooklm-cli-adapter.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/lib/notebooklm-cli-adapter.sh#L413)); live CLI uses flat `add` positional form (`usage: nlm add <notebook-id> <file>`) and auto-detects URL/file/text ([main.go](/Users/masayuki/go/pkg/mod/github.com/tmc/nlm@v0.0.0-20260306170916-7c12ab8a839d/cmd/nlm/main.go#L222), [main.go](/Users/masayuki/go/pkg/mod/github.com/tmc/nlm@v0.0.0-20260306170916-7c12ab8a839d/cmd/nlm/main.go#L950)). - `mindmap create <notebook> --title ... --confirm [--focus ...]` vs `mindmap <notebook-id> <source-id> [source-id...]` Adapter builds `nlm mindmap create ...` ([notebooklm-cli-adapter.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/lib/notebooklm-cli-adapter.sh#L539)); live CLI requires source IDs and no `create` subverb (`usage: nlm mindmap <notebook-id> <source-id> [source-id...]`) ([main.go](/Users/masayuki/go/pkg/mod/github.com/tmc/nlm@v0.0.0-20260306170916-7c12ab8a839d/cmd/nlm/main.go#L340)). - `infographic create ...` assumed, but no `infographic` command exists Adapter builds `nlm infographic create ...` ([notebooklm-cli-adapter.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/lib/notebooklm-cli-adapter.sh#L541)); live help command list has no `infographic`. - `slides create ...` assumed, but no `slides` command exists Adapter builds `nlm slides create ...` ([notebooklm-cli-adapter.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/lib/notebooklm-cli-adapter.sh#L546)); live help command list has no `slides`. - `studio create ...` assumed in design docs, but no `studio` command exists Live probe `nlm studio create` falls back to top-level usage; no `studio` command is listed by `nlm --help`.
